title: Brushless Motor Extended Warranty
description: All Siyang brushless motor products include an extended 2-year warranty on the motor assembly. This covers motor failure due to manufacturing defects under normal operating conditions.
exclusions: Water or liquid damage to motor
claimProcess:
1. Contact support with your product serial number.
2. Provide proof of purchase and description of the issue.
3. Our technical team will diagnose remotely first.
4. If confirmed, ship to service center for motor replacement.

title: Standard Warranty
description: All Siyang power tools are covered by a standard 1-year warranty from the date of purchase. This warranty covers manufacturing defects in materials and workmanship under normal use.
claimProcess:
1. Contact your distributor with proof of purchase.
2. Describe the defect and provide photos.
3. Ship the tool to the nearest service center.
4. We will repair or replace within 14 business days.
